title: OpenStax Organic Chemistry
description: A source card for the OpenStax Organic Chemistry textbook.

pages.text: OpenStax Organic Chemistry introduces molecular structure, bonding, stereochemistry, reaction mechanisms, spectroscopy, functional groups, and synthesis.
Use this source for advanced chemistry readers who need structured vocabulary and diagrams before extracting smaller passages for adaptation.
OpenStax books carry Creative Commons licenses. Check the linked book page for the exact license before mirroring chapters, figures, or ancillary materials.
